message:
fix: resolve test failures and clippy warnings across 15 connectors

- anthropic: fix simulate test with proper COSE capability token, fix
  stream tool_use SSE partial_json fragment splitting
- discord: rename 10 duplicate test function names (error.rs, types.rs)
- slack: rename 2 duplicate test names, fix Option<Vec> access and types
- notion: include retry_after_ms in RateLimited display, fix duplicates,
  add Serialize derive to ApiErrorResponse
- github: update introspect op count for process_webhook (12→13)
- telegram: propagate tokio compat context to spawned tasks
- datadog: set events.create risk_level to medium (write ops policy)
- clickup/gitlab/make/annas-archive/bigquery: fix trailing slash test
  assertions (trim_end_matches strips all, not just one)
- make: use base.handshaken for health status instead of session_id
- s3: include retry_after_ms in RateLimited display
- youtube: fix configure auth error message assertion
- llm-router: fix unicode string slicing panic in redacted_label
- bigquery: fix approx PI constant, redundant clone in types test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
